questions: What is the suspected cause of shock (e.g., hemorrhagic, cardiogenic, septic, hypovolemic, distributive)?
What is the patient's systolic blood pressure (mmHg)?
Is there evidence of poor organ perfusion?
Is there an anticipated delay (>30 min) to hemorrhage control?
What is the patient's hemoglobin level (g/dL)?
What is the patient's urine output?
Does the patient have any known allergies? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have G6PD deficiency? (Yes/No)
